Here’s a clean, powerful announcement that officially positions Fighters 1 as a film produced by Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios LLC, along with a visual card for the movie using your franchise identity.Official Announcement — Fighters 1Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios LLC proudly announces Fighters 1, the first cinematic entry in the Fighters Universe — a cross‑platform franchise spanning film, gaming, and expanded world‑building.Fighters 1 marks the beginning of a global action saga built around elite warriors, underground alliances, and a world where every fight carries political, personal, and national consequences. As the debut film from Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios LLC, Fighters 1 introduces the core roster, the international tournament, and the conflict that will drive the entire franchise forward.Fighters 1 — Film Card
